body1: ABT Consulting is a Cape Town-based operational efficiency and business process improvement consultancy. We work with small and medium businesses that have outgrown the way they operate and need the processes, systems, and structure to support their next stage of growth. Our approach is practical, structured, and tailored to your business. We do not produce reports that gather dust. We build solutions that are implemented, adopted, and used.
body2: We founded ABT Consulting on a simple belief: most businesses are not held back by a lack of ambition or talent. They are held back by processes that were never designed to scale. As businesses grow, inefficiencies become more expensive, quality becomes harder to maintain, and owners become trapped in day-to-day operations. We help businesses build the operational foundation they need to grow with confidence, improve consistency, and reduce the hidden costs of inefficiency.
